ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the stars fall, scattering,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the stars fall away,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the seas are erupted
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the seas burst forth,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And when the [contents of] graves are scattered,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and when the graves spill out,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: A soul will [then] know what it has put forth and kept back.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹then˺ each soul will know what it has sent forth or left behind.

ayahs.textArabic: يَٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلۡإِنسَٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلۡكَرِيمِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Ya ayyuha alinsanu ma gharraka birabbika alkareemi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: O mankind, what has deceived you concerning your Lord, the Generous,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: O humanity! What has emboldened you against your Lord, the Most Generous,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Who created you, proportioned you, and balanced you?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Who created you, fashioned you, and perfected your design,

ayahs.textArabic: فِيٓ أَيِّ صُورَةٖ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Fee ayyi sooratin ma shaa rakkabaka
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: In whatever form He willed has He assembled you.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: moulding you in whatever form He willed?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No! But you deny the Recompense.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But no! In fact, you deny the ˹final˺ Judgment,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, [appointed] over you are keepers,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: while you are certainly observed by vigilant,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the virtuous will be in bliss,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And indeed, the wicked will be in Hellfire.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the wicked will be in Hell,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They will [enter to] burn therein on the Day of Recompense,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: burning in it on Judgment Day,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And never therefrom will they be absent.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and they will have no escape from it.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: What will make you realize what Judgment Day is?

ayahs.textArabic: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدۡرَىٰكَ مَا يَوۡمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thumma ma adraka ma yawmu alddeeni
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Again, what will make you realize what Judgment Day is?

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ لَا تَمۡلِكُ نَفۡسٞ لِّنَفۡسٖ شَيۡـٔٗاۖ وَٱلۡأَمۡرُ يَوۡمَئِذٖ لِّلَّهِ
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma la tamliku nafsun linafsin shayan waalamru yawmaithin lillahi
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allah.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹It is˺ the Day no soul will be of ˹any˺ benefit to another whatsoever, for all authority on that Day belongs to Allah ˹entirely˺.
